summary: Tested delivery_note feature for product orders and food orders. Backend API tests passed (7/9, 2 skipped due to no menu items). Frontend code review confirms correct implementation of delivery_note field with validation.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing products and stores
context_for_next_testing_agent: delivery_note feature fully implemented and tested. Field exists in CheckoutPage.js (data-testid='delivery-note-input') and FoodBatchCheckoutPage.js (data-testid='food-delivery-note-input'). Validation requires minimum 10 characters. Backend schemas (OrderCreate, FoodOrderCreate, BatchOrderCreate) all accept delivery_note field.
